{# `page.params` is undefined on pages that didn't declare any custom front-matter fields (most of the docs). Gate on `is defined` so the template stays a no-op for those pages instead of raising a template error at build time. Flat scalar field names (`prev_page_path` / `prev_page_label` / `next_page_path` / `next_page_label`) instead of an inline- table value (`prev_page = { path = ..., label = ... }`) — hwaro's TOML reader exposes scalars under `page.params` reliably but didn't surface inline-table sub-keys, leaving the nav silently empty. #} {% if page.params is defined and (page.params.prev_page_path is defined or page.params.next_page_path is defined) %}
{% if page.params.prev_page_path is defined %} ← {% if page.language == "ko" %}이전{% else %}Previous{% endif %} {{ page.params.prev_page_label }} {% else %} {% endif %} {% if page.params.next_page_path is defined %} {% if page.language == "ko" %}다음{% else %}Next{% endif %} → {{ page.params.next_page_label }} {% else %} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
